tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config system ddos-policy
edit 1
set intf "port2"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set protocol icmp
set action block
set log enable
next
end
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "host-192.168.1.3"
set type ipmask
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
set protocol ICMP
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block_ubuntu_icmp"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "host-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "ICMP"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}
